description:
This Bash scripting quiz tests skills in variables, loops, conditionals, string manipulation, functions, and syntax gotchas. It ranges from basic to tricky difficulty and uses a sharpening/proving tone with a touch of humor. The quiz is designed for developers and sysadmins looking to assess or improve their shell scripting abilities.
Topics: variables, loops, conditionals, string manipulation, functions, syntax gotchas
Audience: Developers and sysadmins with Bash scripting experience
